title: "My Highlights" Digest notification option is unavailable
excerpt: I’m interested in being able to activate the “My Highlights” digest option in the notifications, but it just says the feature is temporarily unavailable, though I don’t know why. Anyone else have this problem?

posts.author: VicH (Vic)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m interested in being able to activate the “My Highlights” digest option in the notifications, but it just says the feature is temporarily unavailable, though I don’t know why. Anyone else have this problem?
